name: concept_context_translation_v1
description: Does adding SNOMED concept context to the EN->KO translation prompt improve quality, and WHERE? Variants: bare term / +semantic tag / +parent hierarchy. Scored vs the KR gold (multi-reference chrF + BGE semantic), reported per hierarchy and weighted toward the hard tail (organisms, morphologies, body structures). Feeds the prompt-optimisation thread: which extra context is worth referencing.
